items.title: Forward Buying, Strong Feed Supply Buffer Malaysia’s Food Costs For Now: Importer
items.summary: Malaysian livestock producers have secured feed supply months in advance, while global corn and soybean stocks remain high, limiting immediate cost pressures despite rising diesel prices, says a commodities importer. The post Forward Buying, Strong Feed Supply Buffer Malaysia’s Food Costs For Now: Importer appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: SSB Tax Fails To Cut Sugary Drinks Consumption: ISIS Malaysia
items.summary: ISIS Malaysia says the SSB tax, a volumetric tax system, is largely ineffective in reducing sugary drinks consumption, with a 10% increase in SSB tax reducing purchases by only less than 2%. ISIS also recommends expanding the SSB tax to condensed milk. The post SSB Tax Fails To Cut Sugary Drinks Consumption: ISIS Malaysia appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Who Protects The Consumer In Private Hospitals? — Ravinder Singh
items.summary: If private hospital costs continue to rise without stronger safeguards for consumers, public trust will inevitably be tested. The post Who Protects The Consumer In Private Hospitals? — Ravinder Singh appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Prioritise Clinical Staff, Reform Parking Lot Management At HRPZ II — Specialist
items.summary: Parking lot management at HRPZ II's ambulatory care centre seems to disproportionately favour non-clinical personnel. Priority must be given to clinical staff, especially junior specialists with a heavy on-call burden. Parking problems affect staff morale. The post Prioritise Clinical Staff, Reform Parking Lot Management At HRPZ II — Specialist appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Dzulkefly: 5,000 Housemanship Slots Offered, Only 529 Medical Graduates Accepted
items.summary: Dr Dzul says medical graduate intake for housemanship halved since 2019. Only 529 graduates reported for 5,000 training slots offered in January 2026. Amid medicolegal payouts, MMC is concerned over training quality if housemanship is shortened to a year. The post Dzulkefly: 5,000 Housemanship Slots Offered, Only 529 Medical Graduates Accepted appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Adeeba Appointed To UN Panel To Review Global Drug Policy
items.summary: Prof Adeeba Kamarulzaman has been appointed to an independent expert panel established by the Commission on Narcotic Drugs for a 2029 global review of drug policy, the first major evaluation of the international drug control machinery in decades. The post Adeeba Appointed To UN Panel To Review Global Drug Policy appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Malaysians May Face More Expensive Chicken And Eggs, Reduced Supply, Producers Warn
items.summary: Producers warn that the Iran war may raise chicken and egg prices in Malaysia because the country relies heavily on imported feed ingredients, especially corn and soybean meal. Sustained high feed/fuel costs may affect supply if producers cut production. The post Malaysians May Face More Expensive Chicken And Eggs, Reduced Supply, Producers Warn appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: UN Experts Call For Malaysia To Strengthen The Social Work Profession — Social Workers Alliance Malaysia
items.summary: SWAM calls on the government to honour the UNCRC by ensuring the upcoming Social Work Profession Bill includes the public sector. The post UN Experts Call For Malaysia To Strengthen The Social Work Profession — Social Workers Alliance Malaysia appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Houseman Mental Health: Why We Must Look Beyond The Ward — Dr Lim Poh Khuen
items.summary: Hospitals must ensure accessible mental health services, mentorship, and safe channels for house officers to seek help without fear of judgement. The post Houseman Mental Health: Why We Must Look Beyond The Ward — Dr Lim Poh Khuen appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Iran War May Raise Food Prices In Malaysia, Warns MCA
items.summary: MCA has warned that the Iran conflict may lead to rising food prices in Malaysia that's dependent on food imports. Shifting the responsibility for resolving food supply issues onto ordinary citizens won't ease the current pressure of rising food prices. The post Iran War May Raise Food Prices In Malaysia, Warns MCA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Cops: Baby at hospital's childcare centre died of suffocation
items.summary: BUTTERWORTH: The death of a four-month-old boy at a 24-hour childcare centre in the Hospital Seberang Jaya compound last week has been confirmed as suffocation. Read full story
